decisions.rationale: Richer context: includes plan objective and remaining task names alongside memory state

decisions.decision: Explicit phase column in issues table
decisions.rationale: More precise than artifact-derived inference; enables programmatic transitions
show() only returns current state; agents need formatted event trail for retry learning
Prevents KV-cache invalidation when artifacts become context in subsequent commands
Preserves reversibility without bloating default output
Avoids template variation that would break cacheability

decisions.decision: SCHEMA_VERSION 1 to 2, ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN
decisions.rationale: Non-destructive; SQLite ADD COLUMN is atomic and backwards-compatible

constraints: history() defaults to last 10 events, 200 char data truncation
